# krateo-authn-chart (chart repo) — LLM doc index

> krateo-authn-chart is the **deployment unit** for authn, the Krateo PlatformOps
> authentication service: the Helm chart that runs the authn workload, the dedicated CRD subchart
> that publishes the four auth CRDs (`User`, `LDAPConfig`, `OAuthConfig`, `OIDCConfig`), and the
> federated agent chart. This index is the agent entry point to the **deployment, CRD and wiring**
> view. The **internals & runtime** view lives in the code repo `braghettos/krateo-authn` `docs/`.

## How to use this index (agents)

You are reading the docs for a SPECIFIC deployed version. This is the **chart-repo half** of the
component docs — deployment, CRDs, and wiring. Fetch every file below **at the CHART tag that matches
the running build**, not `main`:

- chart version = `CompositionDefinition.spec.chart.version` for authn → THIS repo's tag. Read this
  repo's `docs/` at that tag.
- The **internals view** (runtime behavior, login flows, the auth handlers) is the OTHER half: read
  `braghettos/krateo-authn` `docs/llms.txt` at the **image-version** tag = the authn Deployment's
  container image tag (= this chart's `appVersion`).

If something isn't in the docs, read the chart/CRD source at that same tag — don't guess, and don't
trust `main` for a deployed older version. The agent chart (`kagent/chart`, `0.1.x`) versions
independently of the authn component it speaks for — do not read its version as the component's.

## Start here

- [overview.md](overview.md): what authn is and **how it deploys** as a Krateo composition — the
  three-chart layout (`chart/` app, `crds-subchart/` CRDs, `kagent/chart` agent), the
  CompositionDefinition (owned by the installer umbrella), and what the app chart renders
  (Deployment, single `http`/8082 port, ConfigMap-driven env, jwt-sign-key Secret, RBAC, Service).
  Read first.

## Deployment / CRD / wiring

- [crds.md](crds.md): the four CRDs this repo owns from `crds-subchart/` — `User`
  (`basic.authn.krateo.io`), `LDAPConfig` (`ldap.authn.krateo.io`), `OAuthConfig`
  (`oauth.authn.krateo.io`), `OIDCConfig` (`oidc.authn.krateo.io`), all `v1alpha1`: purpose +
  curated key fields (`passwordRef`, `dialURL`/`baseDN`, `clientID`/`clientSecretRef`/`scopes`,
  `discoveryURL`/`redirectURI`, the shared `graphics` styling object, `restActionRef`).
- [wiring.md](wiring.md): the `values.yaml` surface (exposure/`service.type` ClusterIP:8082, the
  ConfigMap-only env model + `AUTHN_*` flags, `jwtSignKeySecretName`, probes, resources), how the
  installer pins+wires it, dependencies (the `authn-crd` Composition, the `jwt-sign-key` Secret,
  RBAC), and the real gotchas (Secret required, ClusterIP-by-default exposure, CSR-approval RBAC,
  the colon-in-basic-auth rule, never bundle the CRDs).

## Cross-repo (the internals & runtime half)

- [code-repo docs/llms.txt](https://github.com/braghettos/krateo-authn/blob/main/docs/llms.txt):
  the code repo's index → the authn service internals (the four login handlers, JWT signing,
  kubeconfig minting via CSR, group resolution). Versioned at the **image** tag.

## Reference

- [README.md](../README.md): product overview, what each chart ships, how the installer consumes it.
- `chart/` — the app Helm chart (templates + `values.yaml` + `values.schema.json`).
- `crds-subchart/` — the `authn-crd` chart (the four auth CRDs; source of truth for CRD fields).
- `kagent/chart/` — the `krateo-authn-agent` chart (the federated specialist agent; versions
  independently).

## Notes

Each doc set is versioned in its own repo: THIS repo's `docs/` at the **chart** tag, the code repo's
`docs/` at the **image** tag. The `README.md` table may lag the actual pinned `crds-subchart`
version — the chart (`crds-subchart/Chart.yaml`) is authoritative.
